The dev marketplace

Sell your apps, games
& templates — fast.

A marketplace built for independent developers. List your digital products, reach real buyers, and keep more of what you earn.

How it works

Launch in five steps.

From sign-up to first sale — here's everything you need to know to get started on Siterifty.

Step 01
Create Your Account
Sign up free in seconds. No credit card required. Your developer profile is ready the moment you register.
Step 02
List Your Product
Upload your app, game, website or template. Add screenshots, a description and set your price. Listing is always 100% free.
Step 03
Get Discovered
Your listing goes live instantly to thousands of developers and buyers browsing the Siterifty marketplace every day.
Step 04
Secure Escrow Payment
When a buyer purchases, funds are held in escrow. Delivery is verified before money moves — completely protected for both sides.
Step 05
Collect Your Earnings
Funds land in your Siterifty wallet instantly. Cash out anytime, pay other sellers, or reinvest in growing your own store.

Real-time Activity
Every transaction, listing, and transfer reflected instantly across the platform.
Escrow Protected
Funds locked until delivery is confirmed. Zero risk for both sides of every deal.
Wallet Native
Deposit once. Pay anyone. Withdraw anytime. No bank-to-bank friction ever.
Instant Settlement

Fraud Detection

Pricing

Simple plans.
No surprises.

Start free and scale as you grow. Every plan includes escrow protection, wallet access, and instant payouts.

All plans include secure escrow · instant wallet payouts · no hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

Product Valuation

Know exactly what your
product is worth.

Before you list, get an instant data-backed valuation of your app, game, website or template. Set a price that wins buyers and never leave money on the table.

Live market data Instant estimate Category benchmarks
Market Comparable Pricing
We analyse thousands of sold listings in your category to benchmark exactly where your product sits in the current market.
Feature-Based Scoring
Code quality, design polish, documentation completeness, and update history all factor into your product's score — automatically.
Demand Trend Signals
Real-time buyer interest data shows you whether demand is rising or cooling — so you can time your listing for maximum exposure.
Listing Audit

Every listing passes
our 9-point audit.

Before anything goes live, our automated systems run a full integrity check — so buyers always get exactly what they paid for.

Ownership Verified
Seller Identity Check
Every seller is identity-verified before listing. No anonymous actors. No spoofed accounts. Real people, real products.
Content Checked
Description Accuracy
Titles, descriptions, and screenshots are cross-checked against the deliverable. No bait-and-switch. What you see is what ships.
Funds Secured
Escrow Pre-check
Payment is locked in escrow the moment a buyer clicks purchase. Funds only release after delivery is confirmed by both parties.
Price Validated
Fair Pricing Review
Listings priced far outside market norms are flagged for review. Protects buyers from inflated listings and sellers from undercutting.
Scanning Active
Duplicate Detection
Our scanner checks every new listing against the full catalog to catch re-listed stolen products or copy-paste scams instantly.
AI Powered
Malware & Risk Scan
Every file upload is sandboxed and scanned for malicious code, suspicious packages, or obfuscated scripts before a buyer can access it.

FAQ

Everything you need
to know.

Listing on Siterifty is always free — no upfront cost, no per-listing fee. We only take a small platform fee from the final sale price. The exact fee rate depends on your plan, and you'll always see it clearly before you list.
When a buyer purchases your product, their payment is immediately locked in our escrow vault. It only releases to your wallet once the buyer confirms they've received and accepted the deliverable. This means sellers can't vanish with money, and buyers always get what they paid for.
Siterifty supports web apps, mobile apps, games, templates, UI kits, scripts, plugins, SaaS tools and more. As long as it's a digital product you built and own the rights to, you can list it. Reselling assets you don't own rights to is prohibited and flagged automatically by our audit system.
Funds hit your Siterifty wallet the instant a sale is confirmed. From there, you can withdraw to your bank, spend on other listings, or let it sit and earn across multiple sales. Withdrawals are processed quickly — no holding periods, no surprise delays.
The AI Agent is an automation layer for your seller account. It can auto-reply to buyer questions, accept or reject offers based on your price floor, drop your price after a set number of days with no interest, and auto-relist expired products. You configure it once — it runs silently in the background while you focus on building.
Yes — always. Upgrade instantly and your new features are available immediately. Downgrading takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle so you never lose access mid-period. There are no cancellation fees or lock-in contracts of any kind.
Still have questions? Chat with us — we're always here.

Seller Tools

Built to help you sell more.

Every tool in your account is designed for one purpose — getting your product in front of real buyers and closing faster.

AI Agent
Auto-reply to buyers, set price floors, accept or reject offers automatically. Your listings work 24/7 even when you're offline.
Automation
Escrow Wallet
Funds lock the moment a deal is agreed. Payment releases when the buyer confirms receipt. Zero risk for both sides — guaranteed.
Security
Price Intelligence
See what similar products sell for. Get data-backed suggestions on where to price your listing for maximum offer velocity.
Analytics
Instant Delivery
Upload your files once. When a deal closes, the buyer gets access automatically — no manual transfers, no inbox follow-ups required.
Delivery
Deal Messaging
Negotiate, clarify, and close inside a single inbox thread. Every message is timestamped and tied to the listing — no context lost.
Communication
Dispute Resolution
If something goes wrong, raise a dispute directly from your inbox. Our review system steps in — funds stay in escrow until it's resolved.
Protection
Trust & Safety

Your money is protected — always.

From the moment a buyer sends an offer to the moment you receive payment, every dollar on Siterifty is protected by our escrow and dispute systems.

Escrow locks funds instantly — payment sits safe until delivery is confirmed by the buyer.
Dispute system protects both sides — if there's a problem, a neutral review process decides the outcome.
Seller verification — profile checks, listing audits, and automated flags keep bad actors out.
No hidden fees ever — the fee shown when you list is the exact fee taken at sale. Nothing changes.
Escrow Protected
Every deal is escrow-locked from offer to confirmation. Sellers can't vanish. Buyers always get what they paid for.
Fast Resolution
Disputes are reviewed and resolved quickly. Funds stay locked until the correct party is identified.
Verified Sellers
Seller profiles are checked against community reports. Consistent violators are removed — automatically.

Automations
Auto-Reply to Buyers
Agent sends instant replies to new inquiries using your listing info and custom tone.
Reply tone:
Auto-Accept Deals
Automatically accept incoming offers above your minimum price threshold.
Min. price ($):
Auto-Reject Low Offers
Decline offers below your floor price and optionally send a polite counter note.
Floor price ($):
Send counter note:
Intelligence
Buyer Trust Scoring
Agent checks buyer history, review score, and wallet balance before acting on their offer.
Smart Price Negotiation
Agent counters low offers with a calculated price (listing price × your wiggle %) instead of flat rejection.
Max discount (%):
Listings & Visibility
Auto-Relist Expired Listings
Automatically repost listings that expire without a sale, keeping your catalogue fresh.
Max re-lists per listing:
Timed Price Drop
Agent lowers listing price by a set % if no deal is struck after a number of days.
Drop by (%): after (days):
